# {{ site.author.name }}

> {{ site.description | strip_newlines }}

Marcia Mount Shoop is a pastor, author, and speaker whose work sits at the
intersection of theology, embodiment, trauma, and justice. She writes
books, preaches sermons, publishes reflections, and speaks to campuses,
congregations, and organizations on sports reform, race and power, and
healing.

## Books
{% for book in site.books %}
- [{{ book.title }}]({{ book.url | absolute_url }}): {{ book.excerpt | default: book.description | strip_newlines }}
{%- endfor %}

## Writing & Talks
{% assign recent_writing = site.writing | sort: "date" | reverse %}
{% for entry in recent_writing limit: 10 %}
- [{{ entry.title }}]({{ entry.url | absolute_url }}) ({{ entry.type_label }}, {{ entry.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}): {{ entry.excerpt }}
{%- endfor %}

## Speaking
Marcia speaks on: Sports Reform, Race & Power, Embodiment & Trauma, and
Congregational Consulting. See {{ "/speaking/" | absolute_url }} for
programs and booking.

## Contact
{{ "/contact/" | absolute_url }}
